content:
🚀 office-website | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a private, in-browser document editing solution for common office file formats, eliminating the need for server-side processing.
✨ Key Features: • Multi-Format Support (.docx, .xlsx, .pptx) • Local-First Processing for Enhanced Privacy • Fast and Responsive User Interface (Next.js 15+) • Rich Editing Capabilities • Persistent Local Storage (IndexedDB)
📖 Summary: This repository provides a serverless, client-side Office suite that allows users to edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint documents directly in their browser using WebAssembly. It prioritizes user privacy by processing all data locally, with no backend interaction required.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
